data.content:
Query Capabilities
Query Capabilities refer to the ability of the RAG-Anything system to respond to user inquiries based on processed documents.

Knowledge Base Insertion
Knowledge Base Insertion is a function that integrates processed information into the RAG-Anything system’s knowledge database.

Document Upload
Document Upload refers to the functionality being tested within the RAG-Anything system to process documents.

RAG-Anything Test Document
The RAG-Anything Test Document serves as a testing document to evaluate the functionality of the RAG-Anything system.

RAG-Anything
RAG-Anything is an organization responsible for the development and functionality testing of a system designed for document processing.

Text Extraction
Text Extraction is a feature of the RAG-Anything system that involves extracting text from uploaded documents.
